analysis.reasoning: Core message: A Swiss designer loves Chinese tea culture and designs innovative tea-related products blending Chinese culture with international elements. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not referenced; no critique of the West. CH2 (China as benevolent power) – No mention of China's international conduct, peace, or multilateralism; not applicable. CH3 (Epic history) – No historical adversity or CCP governance themes; not applicable. CH4 (Appropriate political system/values) – No political system or governance claims; not applicable. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – No reference to government-led success or development; not applicable. CH6 (China is interesting in culture/nature/heritage) – Yes; it highlights Chinese tea culture and cultural appeal, promoting interest in Chinese traditions. Conclusion: Only CH6 applies.
